steps.title: Name the composition relation
steps.content: The sentence says the all-female cast ______ an array of female characters. The blank must show that the cast is made up of those characters, including a strong mother and several daughters.

steps.title: Reject action mismatches
steps.content: A would mean encloses or overwhelms, B would mean inspires, and D would mean provokes. None describes a cast consisting of the characters it performs.

steps.title: Use the precise verb
steps.content: Comprises means is made up of, matching the relationship between the cast and the array of female characters. The answer is C.
